secret_patterns.name: us_ssn_formatted
secret_patterns.description: US Social Security Number in XXX-XX-XXXX format

secret_patterns.name: us_ssn_no_dashes
secret_patterns.description: 9-digit number that could be an SSN without dashes. Low confidence — many false positives.

secret_patterns.name: credit_card_visa
secret_patterns.description: Visa card number (starts with 4, 13 or 16 digits)

secret_patterns.name: credit_card_mastercard
secret_patterns.description: Mastercard number (starts with 51-55, 16 digits)

secret_patterns.name: credit_card_amex
secret_patterns.description: American Express card (starts with 34 or 37, 15 digits)

secret_patterns.name: credit_card_formatted
secret_patterns.description: Credit card with separators (XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX)

secret_patterns.name: email_address
secret_patterns.description: Email address (user@domain.tld)

secret_patterns.name: us_phone_formatted
secret_patterns.description: US phone number in common formats

secret_patterns.name: international_phone
secret_patterns.description: International phone number with country code, supporting multi-segment mixed-separator formats

secret_patterns.name: international_phone_local
secret_patterns.description: Non-plus-prefixed international/local phone — trunk-0 or international-access-00 prefixed multi-segment format (e.g. UK '020 7946 0958', DE '0911 1234567', Ai4Privacy '076 1352.8018')

secret_patterns.name: ipv4_address
secret_patterns.description: IPv4 address with octet range validation

secret_patterns.name: ipv6_address
secret_patterns.description: IPv6 address (full form)

secret_patterns.name: iban
secret_patterns.description: International Bank Account Number (IBAN)

secret_patterns.name: us_passport
secret_patterns.description: US passport number (1 letter + 8 digits). Low confidence — many false positives.

secret_patterns.name: us_drivers_license
secret_patterns.description: US driver's license (varies by state, letter + 7-12 digits). Very low confidence alone.

secret_patterns.name: date_of_birth_format
secret_patterns.description: Date in MM/DD/YYYY or MM-DD-YYYY format (could be any date, not necessarily DOB)

secret_patterns.name: date_iso_format
secret_patterns.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY/MM/DD format (ISO-like)

secret_patterns.name: us_medical_record_number
secret_patterns.description: Medical Record Number with contextual prefix

secret_patterns.name: icd10_code
secret_patterns.description: ICD-10 diagnosis code (letter + 2 digits + decimal + 1-4 digits). Requires decimal portion to reduce FPs on generic codes. Low confidence alone — needs column-name context.

secret_patterns.name: mac_address
secret_patterns.description: MAC address (XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX or XX-XX-XX-XX-XX-XX)

secret_patterns.name: us_itin
secret_patterns.description: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (9XX-[7-9]X-XXXX)

secret_patterns.name: credit_card_discover
secret_patterns.description: Discover card number (starts with 6011 or 65, 16 digits)

secret_patterns.name: uk_nino
secret_patterns.description: UK National Insurance Number (2 letters + 6 digits + 1 letter)

secret_patterns.name: bg_egn
secret_patterns.description: Bulgarian EGN (Единен граждански номер) — 10-digit civil number with weighted checksum

secret_patterns.name: cz_rodne_cislo
secret_patterns.description: Czech rodné číslo (birth number) — YYMMDD/NNNN, divisible by 11

secret_patterns.name: ch_ahv
secret_patterns.description: Swiss AHV/AVS social security number — 756.XXXX.XXXX.XX with EAN-13 checksum

secret_patterns.name: dk_cpr
secret_patterns.description: Danish CPR number (civil registration) — DDMMYY-NNNN with mod-11 check

secret_patterns.name: url
secret_patterns.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL. Classified as PII when it may contain tracking parameters or user-specific paths.

secret_patterns.name: us_npi
secret_patterns.description: US National Provider Identifier (10 digits, Luhn validated)

secret_patterns.name: us_dea
secret_patterns.description: US DEA registration number

secret_patterns.name: us_mbi
secret_patterns.description: US Medicare Beneficiary Identifier

secret_patterns.name: vin
secret_patterns.description: Vehicle Identification Number

secret_patterns.name: us_ein
secret_patterns.description: US Employer Identification Number

secret_patterns.name: dob_european
secret_patterns.description: Date of birth European format DD/MM/YYYY or DD.MM.YYYY. Sprint 12 retired the separate DATE_OF_BIRTH_EU subtype — format does not indicate jurisdiction, and GDPR / CCPA / HIPAA treat dates of birth as PII regardless of format. Ambiguous cases (day<=12) also match the US date_of_birth_format pattern; both findings collapse to DATE_OF_BIRTH.

secret_patterns.name: dob_long_format
secret_patterns.description: Date of birth long format (Month DD, YYYY)

secret_patterns.name: swift_bic
secret_patterns.description: SWIFT/BIC bank code

secret_patterns.name: bitcoin_address
secret_patterns.description: Bitcoin address (P2PKH/P2SH/Bech32, checksum-verified)

secret_patterns.name: ethereum_address
secret_patterns.description: Ethereum/EVM address

secret_patterns.name: aba_routing
secret_patterns.description: ABA routing transit number

secret_patterns.name: canadian_sin
secret_patterns.description: Canadian Social Insurance Number

secret_patterns.name: 1password_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: 1Password secret key (A3-XXXXXX-... format). Fixed prefix with structured alphanumeric segments.

secret_patterns.name: adobe_client_secret
secret_patterns.description: Adobe OAuth client secret (p8e- prefix, 32 alphanumeric chars). Case-insensitive suffix.

secret_patterns.name: age_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: Age encryption tool secret key (AGE-SECRET-KEY-1 prefix, bech32 charset).

secret_patterns.name: airtable_pat
secret_patterns.description: Airtable Personal Access Token — 'pat' prefix + 14-char token ID + dot separator + 32-64 char secret body

secret_patterns.name: alibaba_access_key_id
secret_patterns.description: Alibaba Cloud access key ID (LTAI prefix, 20 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: anthropic_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api/admin prefix, 93+ char suffix)

secret_patterns.name: argon2_hash
secret_patterns.description: Argon2 password hash ($argon2id$, $argon2i$, $argon2d$ prefix + version/params/salt/hash segments).

secret_patterns.name: artifactory_api_key_structured
secret_patterns.description: JFrog Artifactory API key (AKCp prefix, 69 alphanumeric chars). Distinct from reference tokens.

secret_patterns.name: artifactory_api_token
secret_patterns.description: JFrog Artifactory API token (AKC prefix)

secret_patterns.name: atlassian_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Atlassian (Jira/Confluence) API token with atatt3 prefix (189 chars total).

secret_patterns.name: authress_service_client_key
secret_patterns.description: Authress service client access key (sc_/ext_/scauth_/authress_ prefix with multi-segment dotted format).

secret_patterns.name: aws_access_key
secret_patterns.description: AWS Access Key ID (AKIA prefix + 16 alphanumeric)

secret_patterns.name: aws_access_key_id_extended
secret_patterns.description: AWS temporary (ASIA), AWS Billing (ABIA), or ACCA access key IDs complementing AKIA coverage.

secret_patterns.name: aws_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: Potential AWS Secret Key (40 chars base64). Low confidence alone — usually paired with access key context. Validator rejects pure-hex strings (git SHAs, checksums).

secret_patterns.name: azure_ad_client_secret
secret_patterns.description: Azure AD client secret (Q~ pattern with alphanumeric prefix). Azure app registration secrets.

secret_patterns.name: azure_storage_account_key
secret_patterns.description: Azure Storage Account key (AccountKey= connection string fragment)

secret_patterns.name: basicauth_url
secret_patterns.description: HTTP Basic Auth credentials embedded in URL (user:password@host)

secret_patterns.name: bcrypt_hash
secret_patterns.description: bcrypt password hash ($2a$/$2b$/$2y$ prefix, cost + 22-char salt + 31-char hash).

secret_patterns.name: clojars_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Clojars package registry API token (CLOJARS_ prefix, 60 alphanumeric chars). Case-insensitive.

secret_patterns.name: cloudflare_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Cloudflare API token

secret_patterns.name: connection_string
secret_patterns.description: Database connection string with protocol prefix

secret_patterns.name: databricks_token
secret_patterns.description: Databricks personal access token (dapi prefix + 32 hex-like chars)

secret_patterns.name: digitalocean_oauth_token
secret_patterns.description: DigitalOcean OAuth access token

secret_patterns.name: digitalocean_pat
secret_patterns.description: DigitalOcean Personal Access Token

secret_patterns.name: discord_bot_token
secret_patterns.description: Discord bot token

secret_patterns.name: docker_hub_pat
secret_patterns.description: Docker Hub personal access token (dckr_pat_ prefix, 27 chars, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: doppler_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Doppler secrets manager API token (dp.pt. prefix, 43 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: duffel_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Duffel travel API token (duffel_test_ or duffel_live_ prefix).

secret_patterns.name: dynatrace_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Dynatrace API token (dt0c01. prefix with two dotted segments of 24 and 64 chars).

secret_patterns.name: easypost_api_key
secret_patterns.description: EasyPost live API key (EZAK prefix, 54 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: easypost_test_api_key
secret_patterns.description: EasyPost test API key (EZTK prefix, 54 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: facebook_access_token
secret_patterns.description: Facebook/Meta page access token (EAAMxxxx or EAACxxxx prefix, 100+ alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: facebook_graph_token
secret_patterns.description: Facebook Graph API access token (EAA prefix, 20-400 alphanumeric chars). EAA covers all Facebook Graph API token variants. S0 WildChat corpus found 11 true-positive hits.

secret_patterns.name: figma_pat
secret_patterns.description: Figma personal access token (figd_ prefix)

secret_patterns.name: flutterwave_public_key
secret_patterns.description: Flutterwave test public key (FLWPUBK_TEST- prefix, hex-subset chars, -X suffix).

secret_patterns.name: flutterwave_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: Flutterwave test secret key (FLWSECK_TEST- prefix, hex-subset chars, -X suffix).

secret_patterns.name: flyio_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Fly.io API token

secret_patterns.name: frameio_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Frame.io (Adobe) API token (fio-u- prefix, 64 alphanumeric/symbol chars).

secret_patterns.name: generic_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Generic API key assignment pattern (api_key=... or api-key: ...)

secret_patterns.name: github_token
secret_patterns.description: GitHub personal access token or OAuth token

secret_patterns.name: gitlab_pat
secret_patterns.description: GitLab personal access token (glpat- prefix)

secret_patterns.name: gitlab_token_extended
secret_patterns.description: GitLab extended token types: CICD job (glcbt-), deploy (gldt-), feature-flag (glffct-), feed (glft-), incoming-mail (glimt-), k8s-agent (glagent-), oauth (gloas-), pipeline-trigger (glptt-), runner (glrt-), SCIM (glsoat-).

secret_patterns.name: google_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Google API key (AIza prefix + 35 chars)

secret_patterns.name: grafana_cloud_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Grafana Cloud API token (glc_ prefix, base64 JWT body)

secret_patterns.name: grafana_legacy_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Grafana legacy API key (base64-encoded JSON starting with eyJrIjoi = '{"k":"'). Lower confidence — starts with eyJ like any JWT, but eyJrIjoi is specific to Grafana's key structure.

secret_patterns.name: grafana_service_account_token
secret_patterns.description: Grafana service account token (glsa_ prefix, 32 alnum + 8 hex checksum)

secret_patterns.name: groq_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Groq API key (gsk_ prefix, 52 alphanumeric, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: harness_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Harness.io personal (pat.) or service account (sat.) API token with three dotted segments.

secret_patterns.name: hashicorp_terraform_token
secret_patterns.description: HashiCorp Terraform Cloud API token (14-char prefix + .atlasv1. + 60-70 char suffix).

secret_patterns.name: hashicorp_vault_token
secret_patterns.description: HashiCorp Vault token

secret_patterns.name: hashicorp_vault_token_extended
secret_patterns.description: HashiCorp Vault batch token (hvb. prefix, 138-300 alphanumeric chars). Complements hvs. service tokens.

secret_patterns.name: heroku_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Heroku OAuth access token (HRKU- prefix, 65 chars total including prefix). New format since April 2025; pre-2025 tokens are UUID format without prefix.

secret_patterns.name: heroku_api_key_v2
secret_patterns.description: Heroku API key v2 format (HRKU-AA prefix, 58 chars). Distinct from legacy heroku_api_key UUID format.

secret_patterns.name: huggingface_token
secret_patterns.description: Hugging Face API token

secret_patterns.name: infracost_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Infracost cloud cost estimation API token (ico- prefix, 32 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: instagram_legacy_token
secret_patterns.description: Instagram legacy access token (7-char hex user_id . 32-char hex token). Lower confidence — hex.hex format is somewhat generic; context boost or validator recommended.

secret_patterns.name: jwt_token
secret_patterns.description: JSON Web Token (three base64url segments starting with eyJ)

secret_patterns.name: langfuse_public_key
secret_patterns.description: Langfuse public key — pk-lf- prefix followed by 32+ alphanumeric/hyphen characters. Format from Langfuse SDK documentation (langfuse.com/docs/sdk).

secret_patterns.name: langfuse_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: Langfuse secret key — sk-lf- prefix followed by 32+ alphanumeric/hyphen characters. Format from Langfuse SDK documentation (langfuse.com/docs/sdk).

secret_patterns.name: langsmith_api_key
secret_patterns.description: LangSmith (LangChain) API key — PAT (lsv2_pt_) or service key (lsv2_sk_) with hex body segments

secret_patterns.name: linear_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Linear API key

secret_patterns.name: linear_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Linear API token (lin_api_ prefix)

secret_patterns.name: mailchimp_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Mailchimp API key (32 hex chars + datacenter suffix -usN)

secret_patterns.name: mailgun_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Mailgun API key (key- prefix + 32 hex chars)

secret_patterns.name: mapbox_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Mapbox public access token (pk. prefix, 60-char scope + 22-char ID dotted format).

secret_patterns.name: microsoft_teams_webhook
secret_patterns.description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL (webhook.office.com/webhookb2/ with UUID path structure).

secret_patterns.name: netlify_pat
secret_patterns.description: Netlify Personal Access Token

secret_patterns.name: new_relic_api_key
secret_patterns.description: New Relic user API key (NRAK- prefix, 27 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: new_relic_browser_token
secret_patterns.description: New Relic browser API token (NRJS- prefix, 19 hex chars).

secret_patterns.name: new_relic_insert_key
secret_patterns.description: New Relic insert (Insights) key (NRII- prefix, 32 chars).

secret_patterns.name: newrelic_browser_token
secret_patterns.description: New Relic Browser/JS Agent token (NRJS- prefix, 19 lowercase hex chars, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: newrelic_user_api_key
secret_patterns.description: New Relic User API Key (NRAK- prefix, 27 uppercase alphanumeric chars, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: notion_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Notion API integration token (ntn_ prefix, 11-digit numeric + 35 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: notion_integration_token
secret_patterns.description: Notion integration token (ntn_ prefix, 11 digits + 35 alnum, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: npm_token
secret_patterns.description: npm access token

secret_patterns.name: nvidia_nim_api_key
secret_patterns.description: NVIDIA NIM/NGC API key (nvapi- prefix)

secret_patterns.name: okta_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Okta SSWS API token — starts with '00', 42 chars total, alphanumeric + hyphens. Used in Authorization: SSWS <token> header.

secret_patterns.name: onepassword_service_token
secret_patterns.description: 1Password service account token (ops_ prefix, base64 JSON body starting with ey)

secret_patterns.name: openai_api_key
secret_patterns.description: OpenAI project API key (sk-proj- prefix, 80+ chars)

secret_patterns.name: openai_legacy_key
secret_patterns.description: OpenAI legacy API key (sk- prefix, 48-char suffix, no proj- infix)

secret_patterns.name: openshift_user_token
secret_patterns.description: OpenShift user API token (sha256~ prefix, 43 URL-safe base64 chars).

secret_patterns.name: packagist_token
secret_patterns.description: Packagist API token (packagist_ prefix, 3-char env tag, 68 hex chars, fixed length)

secret_patterns.name: perplexity_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Perplexity AI API key (pplx- prefix, 48 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: planetscale_api_token
secret_patterns.description: PlanetScale API token (pscale_tkn_ prefix).

secret_patterns.name: planetscale_password
secret_patterns.description: PlanetScale database password (pscale_pw_ prefix).

secret_patterns.name: posthog_api_key
secret_patterns.description: PostHog API key — phc_ (project API key) or phx_ (personal API key) prefix followed by 40+ alphanumeric characters. Format from PostHog developer documentation (posthog.com/docs/api).

secret_patterns.name: postman_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Postman API key (PMAK- prefix, 24-hex ID segment + hyphen + 34-hex secret segment, total ~63 chars after prefix)

secret_patterns.name: prefect_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Prefect Cloud API token (pnu_ prefix, 36 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: private_key_pem
secret_patterns.description: PEM-encoded private key header

secret_patterns.name: pulumi_access_token
secret_patterns.description: Pulumi access token

secret_patterns.name: pypi_token
secret_patterns.description: PyPI upload token (pypi- prefix with static base64-encoded pypi.org or test.pypi.org identifier)

secret_patterns.name: random_password
secret_patterns.description: Column-name-gated random password: short mixed-class string in a password/secret column. Emits OPAQUE_SECRET — it's a shape detector (length + char-class diversity) not a specific prefix/format match, so the subtype is 'opaque' rather than API_KEY/PASSWORD_HASH.

secret_patterns.name: readme_api_token
secret_patterns.description: ReadMe.io API token (rdme_ prefix, 70 lowercase alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: render_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Render.com API key (rnd_ prefix). Format documented on render.com API authentication page.

secret_patterns.name: replicate_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Replicate API key — r8_ prefix followed by exactly 40 alphanumeric characters. Format documented at replicate.com/docs/reference/http#authentication.

secret_patterns.name: rubygems_api_token
secret_patterns.description: RubyGems.org API token (rubygems_ prefix, 48 hex chars).

secret_patterns.name: scalingo_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Scalingo PaaS API token (tk-us- prefix, 48 alphanumeric chars).

secret_patterns.name: scrypt_hash
secret_patterns.description: scrypt password hash ($scrypt$ prefix with optional params + salt + hash).

secret_patterns.name: sendgrid_api_key
secret_patterns.description: SendGrid API key (SG. prefix with two base64 segments)

secret_patterns.name: sendinblue_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Sendinblue (Brevo) API token (xkeysib- prefix, 64 hex + dash + 16 alphanumeric).

secret_patterns.name: sentry_auth_token
secret_patterns.description: Sentry auth token

secret_patterns.name: sentry_user_token
secret_patterns.description: Sentry user API token (sntryu_ prefix, 64 hex chars). Distinct from org tokens.

secret_patterns.name: settlemint_access_token
secret_patterns.description: SettleMint application (sm_aat_), personal (sm_pat_), or service (sm_sat_) access tokens.

secret_patterns.name: shacrypt_hash
secret_patterns.description: SHA-256 ($5$) or SHA-512 ($6$) crypt password hash (glibc/Linux shadow format).

secret_patterns.name: shippo_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Shippo shipping API token (shippo_live_ or shippo_test_ prefix, 40 hex chars).

secret_patterns.name: shopify_access_token
secret_patterns.description: Shopify access token (shpat_, shpca_, shppa_, shpss_ prefix + 32 hex)

secret_patterns.name: slack_app_token
secret_patterns.description: Slack app-level token (xapp- prefix with numeric version and component IDs).

secret_patterns.name: slack_bot_token
secret_patterns.description: Slack bot token (xoxb- prefix)

secret_patterns.name: slack_config_refresh_token
secret_patterns.description: Slack configuration refresh token (xoxe- prefix, version digit + 146 uppercase alphanumeric).

secret_patterns.name: slack_user_token
secret_patterns.description: Slack user token (xoxp- prefix)

secret_patterns.name: slack_webhook_url
secret_patterns.description: Slack incoming webhook URL

secret_patterns.name: sourcegraph_access_token
secret_patterns.description: Sourcegraph access token (sgp_ prefix with 16-char instance ID + 40-char secret).

secret_patterns.name: square_oauth_secret
secret_patterns.description: Square OAuth application secret (sq0csp- prefix, 43-char body)

secret_patterns.name: stripe_publishable_key
secret_patterns.description: Stripe publishable key (less sensitive than secret, but still a credential)

secret_patterns.name: stripe_secret_key
secret_patterns.description: Stripe secret or restricted key (sk_live_*, rk_live_*, sk_test_*)

secret_patterns.name: supabase_service_key
secret_patterns.description: Supabase service role / personal access token

secret_patterns.name: telegram_bot_token
secret_patterns.description: Telegram bot token (numeric bot ID + colon + 35-char alphanumeric token)

secret_patterns.name: terraform_cloud_token
secret_patterns.description: Terraform Cloud / HCP Terraform API token

secret_patterns.name: twilio_api_key
secret_patterns.description: Twilio API key (SK prefix + 32 hex chars)

secret_patterns.name: typeform_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Typeform API personal access token (tfp_ prefix, 59 chars).

secret_patterns.name: vercel_api_token
secret_patterns.description: Vercel API token

secret_patterns.name: xai_api_key
secret_patterns.description: xAI (Grok) API key — xai- prefix followed by 52+ base62 characters. Format documented at docs.x.ai/api.
